name: Aegiochusmon
description: Aegiochusmon digi-evolved from his champion stage, Aegiomon, out of wanting to protect Inori, someone who he has a big sister and little brother like bond with. (Being honest, I was originally gonna do Aegiomon, but I didn’t want any potential problems with Janitor’s guidelines. Also, this is my first bot, so if you wanna, list down any improvements I could do on the bot)
